topics.zh_topic: 习近平与特朗普在北京举行会晤，达成一系列新共识
topics.en_topic: Xi and Trump hold meeting in Beijing, reach series of new common understandings
topics.zh_summary: 中国国家主席习近平与美国总统特朗普于5月15日在北京举行会晤，双方就两国及全球重大问题进行了深入交流，并达成了一系列新的共识。这是特朗普自2017年11月以来第二次访华，也是九年来首位访华的美国总统。两位领导人同意建立具有战略稳定性的建设性中美关系新愿景，为未来三年及更长时间的中美关系提供战略指导，促进两国关系的稳步、健康和可持续发展。双方还同意加强在国际和地区问题上的沟通与协调。此次会晤旨在增进相互理解、深化信任、推动务实合作，为两国人民带来更多利益，并为世界注入必要的稳定与确定性。
topics.en_summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping and U.S. President Donald Trump met in Beijing on May 15, where they engaged in an in-depth exchange on major issues concerning both countries and the world, reaching a series of new common understandings. This marks Trump's second visit to China since November 2017 and the first by a U.S. president in nine years. The leaders agreed on a new vision for a constructive China-U.S. relationship of strategic stability, providing guidance for bilateral relations over the next three years and beyond, and promoting steady and sustainable development. They also agreed to strengthen communication and coordination on international and regional issues. The meeting aimed to enhance mutual understanding, deepen trust, advance practical cooperation, and bring benefits to both nations' peoples while injecting stability and certainty into the world.

topics.zh_topic: 马修·韦尔当选所罗门群岛新总理
topics.en_topic: Matthew Wale elected as new Prime Minister of Solomon Islands
topics.zh_summary: 2023年5月15日，马修·韦尔在所罗门群岛国会被选为新总理，接替于5月7日因不信任投票被罢免的杰里迈亚·马内尔。韦尔以26票对22票的结果击败了前外交部长彼得·沙内尔·阿戈瓦卡。韦尔在当选后表示，政府将在全球面临挑战的情况下，采取纪律和审慎的管理。他呼吁全国团结，共同应对必要的变革，以促进国家的繁荣。韦尔于2008年当选为国会议员，曾在2019年成为反对派领袖。
topics.en_summary: On May 15, 2023, Matthew Wale was elected as the new Prime Minister of the Solomon Islands by members of parliament, succeeding Jeremiah Manele, who was removed from office on May 7 following a no-confidence vote. Wale won the election with a 26-to-22 vote against former Minister for Foreign Affairs Peter Shanel Agovaka. After his election, Wale stated that the government would exercise discipline and prudent management during challenging global times and called for national unity to implement necessary changes for the country's prosperity. Wale has been a Member of Parliament since 2008 and served as the Leader of the Opposition after the 2019 election.

topics.zh_topic: 中国成功发射力箭一号运载火箭，将五颗卫星送入太空
topics.en_topic: China launches Lijian-1 rocket, sending five satellites into space
topics.zh_summary: 中国于5月15日发射了一枚Lijian-1 Y13运载火箭，成功将五颗卫星送入预定轨道。火箭于北京时间12:33从中国西北部的东风商业航天创新试点区发射。这次发射标志着Lijian-1运载火箭的第13次飞行任务。
topics.en_summary: On May 15, China launched a Lijian-1 Y13 carrier rocket, successfully sending five satellites into their designated orbits. The rocket lifted off at 12:33 p.m. Beijing Time from the Dongfeng commercial space innovation pilot zone in northwest China. This launch marks the 13th flight mission of the Lijian-1 carrier rocket.

topics.zh_topic: 韩国股市暴跌逾6%，触发卖盘侧车机制
topics.en_topic: S. Korean stocks drop over 6 pct, triggering sell-side sidecar
topics.zh_summary: 韩国股市在5月15日下跌超过6%，触发了卖方侧边交易机制。与此同时，韩国外汇交易因对美元和人民币的强劲需求而增长，4月日均交易额达到约490亿美元。尽管外汇交易增加，韩元对美元的波动性有所下降，4月末韩元兑美元汇率为1483.3。韩国的出口量因对本地半导体的需求强劲而增长，4月出口量指数同比上涨12.4%。
topics.en_summary: On May 15, South Korean stocks dropped over 6%, triggering a sell-side sidecar mechanism. Concurrently, foreign exchange trading in South Korea grew due to strong demand for the U.S. and Chinese currencies, with an average daily transaction of about $49 billion in April. Despite the increase in foreign exchange trading, the volatility of the won against the dollar decreased, with the exchange rate at 1,483.3 won per dollar at the end of April. South Korea's export volume surged 12.4% year-on-year in April, driven by strong demand for locally-made semiconductors.

topics.zh_summary: 日本各地发生的熊袭击事件导致至少两人死亡，十人受伤。这些袭击自四月以来在六个县发生，受害者大多是在森林地区采摘野生植物时遭到攻击。环境部呼吁公众采取预防措施，如在户外携带收音机或熊铃，避免单独出行，并检查当地政府发布的熊出没警报。官方数据显示，2025财年日本的熊袭击事件造成238人受伤，其中包括13人死亡。
topics.en_summary: Bear attacks across six Japanese prefectures have resulted in at least two deaths and ten injuries since April. Most victims were attacked in forested areas while foraging for wild plants. Japan's Environment Ministry has urged the public to take precautions, such as carrying radios or bear bells outdoors, traveling in groups, and checking local bear sighting alerts. Official data indicates that bear attacks in Japan resulted in 238 casualties in fiscal 2025, including 13 fatalities.

topics.zh_topic: 中国成功批量克隆超级高产奶山羊
topics.en_topic: China achieves successful batch cloning of super high-yield dairy goats
topics.zh_summary: 中国科学家在陕西省成功克隆了六只超高产奶山羊，这是该国首次实现此类动物的批量克隆，标志着奶山羊育种技术的重大突破。该项目由西北农林科技大学的研究团队领导，克隆的山羊来自年均产奶量超过2800公斤的优质萨能母羊。克隆技术结合了基因组选择和体细胞克隆，显著缩短了育种周期，解决了优质种羊繁殖缓慢和优良性状保持困难等行业瓶颈。陕西省是中国奶山羊的主要产区，承担着国家奶制品的主要加工任务。
topics.en_summary: Chinese scientists have successfully cloned six super high-yield dairy goats in Shaanxi Province, marking the country's first successful batch cloning of such animals and a significant breakthrough in dairy goat breeding technology. The project, led by a research team from Northwest A&F University, involved cloning goats from elite Saanen donors with an average annual milk yield exceeding 2,800 kilograms. The cloning technology, which integrates genomic selection and somatic cell cloning, significantly shortens breeding cycles and addresses industry challenges such as slow propagation of elite goats and the difficulty of preserving desirable traits. Shaanxi is a key region for dairy goat production in China.

topics.zh_topic: 澳大利亚报告近十年来首例白喉死亡病例
topics.en_topic: Australia reports first diphtheria death in nearly a decade
topics.zh_summary: 澳大利亚北领地报告了近十年来首例白喉死亡病例，卫生当局正在应对集中在偏远土著社区的疫情。公共卫生官员表示，这起死亡事件发生在几周前，白喉是一种可通过疫苗预防的细菌感染，若不治疗可能致命。北领地于三月宣布疫情，为自1990年代以来首次。全国共报告了多例病例，其中大部分发生在北领地。数据显示，98%以上的病例为土著居民，主要集中在偏远地区。医学专家指出，严重病例多见于未接种或未及时接种加强针的人群，疫情的驱动因素可能包括疫苗接种犹豫和获取疫苗的障碍。
topics.en_summary: Australia's Northern Territory has reported its first diphtheria death in nearly a decade, as health authorities confront an outbreak primarily affecting remote Indigenous communities. Public health officials confirmed the death occurred several weeks ago. Diphtheria is a vaccine-preventable bacterial infection that can be fatal if untreated. The outbreak was declared in March, marking the first since the 1990s, with a significant number of cases reported in the Territory. Over 98% of locally acquired cases are among Indigenous residents, mostly in remote areas. Medical experts indicate that severe cases are prevalent among those unvaccinated or overdue for booster shots, with post-pandemic vaccine hesitancy and access issues cited as potential outbreak drivers.

topics.zh_topic: 辛纳创纪录连胜晋级意大利公开赛四强
topics.en_topic: Sinner sets Masters 1000 winning streak record to reach Italian Open semis
topics.zh_summary: 世界排名第一的贾尼克·西纳在意大利公开赛男单四分之一决赛中以直落两盘战胜12号种子安德烈·鲁布列夫，成功将自己的ATP大师赛1000连胜纪录延续至32场，打破了与诺瓦克·德约科维奇的31场纪录。西纳在首盘以6-2轻松取胜，但在第二盘中表现出疲惫，发球成功率降至39%。尽管如此，他还是以6-4结束了比赛。西纳表示，尽管感到疲惫，但他会尽力应对接下来的比赛，并将与第七种子达尼尔·梅德韦杰夫争夺半决赛资格。女子方面，第三种子科科·高夫以6-4、6-3战胜罗马尼亚老将索拉娜·西尔斯特亚，晋级决赛。
topics.en_summary: World No. 1 Jannik Sinner defeated 12th seed Andrey Rublev in straight sets in the quarterfinals of the Italian Open, extending his ATP Masters 1000 winning streak to a record 32 matches, surpassing Novak Djokovic's previous record of 31. Sinner won the first set 6-2 but showed signs of fatigue in the second, with his first-serve percentage dropping to 39%. He ultimately closed the match 6-4. Sinner expressed that while he feels tired, he is focused on the next match against seventh seed Daniil Medvedev. In the women's draw, third seed Coco Gauff defeated Romanian veteran Sorana Cirstea 6-4, 6-3 to reach the final.

topics.zh_topic: 中美青年对话：美国青年谈对中国文化的印象
topics.en_topic: China-US Youth Talk: New York youth's impressions of Chinese culture
topics.zh_summary: 在中国和美国的青年文化交流中，年轻美国人最近访问了中国，体验了传统文化与现代科技，增进了对中国的理解。同时，CGTN在纽约市进行了一项问答挑战，收集了中国网民对美国的好奇问题，并让美国青年回答。这些问题涵盖了语言学习、对中国美食的看法以及与中国人交友的态度。美国青年对中文的旋律、蒸猪肉包的真实口味以及中美友谊的个人反思进行了诚实的分享，展现了两国青年之间的文化互动与理解。
topics.en_summary: In a cultural exchange between Chinese and American youth, a group of young Americans recently visited China, experiencing both traditional culture and modern technology, which deepened their understanding of the country. Meanwhile, CGTN conducted a Q&A challenge in New York City, gathering curious questions from Chinese netizens about the US and having American youth respond. The questions ranged from language learning and opinions on Chinese food to attitudes about friendship with Chinese people. American youth shared honest reflections on the melodic nature of the Chinese language, the authentic taste of steamed pork buns, and personal insights on grassroots China-US friendship, highlighting cultural interaction and understanding between the two nations.
